command: echo 'Current directory:' && pwd && echo 'Directory contents:' && ls -la
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then echo 'Artisan found in current directory'; chmod +x artisan; else echo 'Artisan NOT found in current directory'; fi
if [ -f '.env.coolify' ]; then cp .env.coolify .env; echo 'Copied .env.coolify to .env'; else echo '.env.coolify not found'; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan key:generate --force; else echo 'Cannot run artisan commands: artisan not found'; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan config:clear; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan cache:clear; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan view:clear; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan route:clear; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan storage:link; fi
if [ -f 'artisan' ]; then php artisan migrate --force; fi
if [ -f 'package.json' ]; then npm install && npm run build; else echo 'package.json not found'; fi
